prompt: Modern Afro-Caribbean inspired logo on solid black background. The letters MM are stylized into a bold geometric mask-like shape — two M forms side by side creating a symmetrical face or shield pattern, inspired by Caribbean carnival masks and African geometric art, but rendered in a completely modern flat design style. Bold white shapes with sharp clean edges. Electric cyan (#00E3FF) accent lines define the eyes or central axis of the mask shape. Below, 'MM AGENCY.' in contemporary sans-serif uppercase, wide tracking, cyan dot. The design feels bold, cultural, proud, modern — not traditional or folkloric but a contemporary reinterpretation of cultural visual language. Vector quality, clean, powerful, centered on black.
